prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: character portrait. Story world: The Fourth Tenant. Premise: Rent is collected from an apartment that appears on no official map.. Setting: Flood-district prewar apartment block. Threat presence: The Landlord of Rooms That Move. Recurring motifs: door chains, wet plaster, rent slips. Character portrait for Building Superintendent Leda Price, role HANDLER. Traits: guarded, analytical. Response style: accusation=Defensive and selective.; threat=Withdraws and delays.; questioning=Provides partial truths first... Subgenre: supernatural mystery. Tone: EERIE. Immediate scene brief: The Fourth Tenant - Building Superintendent Leda Price Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.
